title: machaerina preissii
intro: Machaerina preissii, also known as the Australian Saw Sedge, is a type of rhizomatous aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in Australian indigenous medicine, and its roots are valued for their medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Machaerina preissii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as prevent infections. Machaerina preissii is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and it can also be dried and used in herbal teas or tinctures.
